hooks.command: CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm\s+-[^\s]*r|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+checkout\s+--|git\s+clean\s+-f)'; then echo "Blocked: dangerous command detected: $CMD" >&2; exit 1; fi
FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.mcp\.json|\.claude/settings)'; then echo "Blocked: writes to sensitive file not allowed: $FILE" >&2; exit 1; fi
FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then ruff check --fix "$FILE" && ruff format "$FILE"; fi
FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v bandit >/dev/null 2>&1; then bandit -q "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "[bandit] Issues found — run /security-check"; fi
